events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: an unprotected trench ≥5 ft with workers inside is an immediate stop-work condition under OSHA 1926.652(a)(1) — critical risk, fail decision, requiring evacuation, barricading, competent-person soil classification, and installation of a protective system (sloping/benching, shielding, or shoring) plus compliant egress before anyone re-enters.
